- Native install model: separate native asset install

## Native compatibility

- [ ] Windows consumers use matching `sdk_rust.dll`
- [ ] Linux consumers use matching `libsdk_rust.so`
- [ ] macOS consumers use matching `libsdk_rust.dylib`
- [ ] Header/install-path instructions still match `README.md`
